dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, we lost good people during {quest_origin}. {quest_stakes} gave their lives defending us, and {quest_threat} are still out there celebrating their kills.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I cannot let their sacrifice go unanswered. We need to {quest_action}. {quest_ally} tracked the warband to an area {location_hint}. Find them and collect {quest_item} from {quest_focus} as proof.
dialogueChunks.outro: Those guards were family to this settlement. Their memory demands justice.

playerResponses.text: They will pay for every life they took.
Revenge is a dangerous road. But I understand.
The dead are dead. More killing will not bring them back.

dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_threat} killed two of our own last week, {player_name}. {quest_stakes} were out tending the flocks when they were dragged off. We found what was left.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The community is grieving and furious. We need to {quest_action} and wipe out {quest_threat} {quest_time_pressure}. {quest_focus} is somewhere {location_hint}. Take {quest_item} to flush them out.
dialogueChunks.outro: We bury our people tomorrow. I want to tell them at the pyre that it is done.

playerResponses.text: I will make sure no more shepherds die to those things.
Exterminating a nest is ugly work. But necessary.
Nature is cruel. There is no point in revenge against beasts.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, during {quest_origin}, {quest_threat} killed {quest_stakes} in cold blood. The merchant was kin to half this settlement.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The whole community wants blood. I need you to {quest_action} from {quest_focus}. {quest_ally} says they are holed up {location_hint}. Recover {quest_item} from the scene as evidence.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_stakes} left behind a family. They deserve closure, and {quest_reward_hint} has funds set aside for exactly this purpose.

playerResponses.text: Murder demands an answer. I will find them.
A bounty from the estate works for me.
Hunting bandits in their own hideout? Too risky.
